{{usage div}} '''Version-at-a-glance:''' :2) source: Wikispecies/wikipedia -- Reconcile categories (Iterim) and code across sister projects // [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 05:53, 17 August 2008 (UTC)
:1) source: Commons -- Move forced italics from before LABEL to default only when undefined, and matching logic for stopping italics... gives user better formatting control, by specifying LABEL. No effect when not defined, so minimal impact. // [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 04:51, 17 August 2008 (UTC)
==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{ Cat see also | List of category names (one or more) }}''' '''Parameters are category page names, Etc., up to 40 parameters . # {{Cat see also|A}} → {{Cat see also|A}}

# {{Cat see also|A|B}} → {{Cat see also|A|B}}

# {{Cat see also|A|B|C}} → {{Cat see also|A|B|C}}
;example w/default message: : {{Cat see also|aaa|bbb|ccc|ddd|eee|fff}} ;would give (display as): : ''See also Categories:'' aaa, bbb, ccc, ddd, and eee ;example w/LABEL parameter option : {{Cat see also|LABEL=See this list to evaluate whether one would be a better choice of |aaa | bbb | ccc | ddd | eee | fff }} ;would give (display as): : ''See this list to evaluate whether one would be a better choice of categories: aaa, bbb, ccc, ddd, eee, and fff'' ;Example: 
{{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}}
{{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are Olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page. {{#ifexist:Template:Templates linking contents| {{Templates linking contents}} }} {{#ifexist:Category:Internal link templates| [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Category navigational templates| [[Category:Category navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifeq:{{Silence}}|NO| {{#ifexist:Category:Templates using ParserFunctions| [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} |}} {{#ifexist:Category:Internal link templates| [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Navigational templates| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Section templates | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:List templates| [[Category:List templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Category namespace templates| [[Category:Category namespace templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} [[Category:See also templates]] [[en:Template:Cat see also]] [[zh:Template:参看]]

{{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}}
{{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are Olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page. {{#ifexist:Template:Templates linking contents| {{Templates linking contents}} }} {{#ifexist:Category:Internal link templates| [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Category navigational templates| [[Category:Category navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifeq:{{Silence}}|NO| {{#ifexist:Category:Templates using ParserFunctions| [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} |}} {{#ifexist:Category:Internal link templates| [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Navigational templates| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Section templates | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:List templates| [[Category:List templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Category namespace templates| [[Category:Category namespace templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:See also templates| [[Category:See also templates]] }} [[en:Template:Cat see also]] [[zh:Template:参看]]

==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{ Cat see also | List of category names (one or more) }}''' '''Parameters:''' # Most are pipe character separated category page names; up to 40 pages # LABEL=''Some other phrase''... → replaces defaults: ''"See also Category:" or "See also categories:"'' (prefix messages). ## That phrase is normally italicized. When defining LABEL any wikimarkup or HTML text will be accepted. ## You may assume a space before the first category link. ## The template is written in an HTML <span>...SISTER=de:V: for linking categories on the {{wpd|German language}} {{wpd|Wikiversity}}, or ## SISTER=fr:B: for linking categories on the {{wpd|French language}} {{wpd|Wikibooks}}. ;Simple examples # {{Cat see also|A}} → {{Cat see also|A}}

# {{Cat see also|A|B}} → {{Cat see also|A|B}}

# {{Cat see also|A|B|C}} → {{Cat see also|A|B|C}}
;example w/default message: : {{Cat see also|aaa|bbb|ccc|ddd|eee|fff}} ;would give (display as): : ''See also Categories:'' aaa, bbb, ccc, ddd, and eee ;example w/LABEL parameter option : {{Cat see also|LABEL=See this list to evaluate whether one would be a better choice of |aaa | bbb | ccc | ddd | eee | fff }} ;would give (display as): : ''See this list to evaluate whether one would be a better choice of categories: aaa, bbb, ccc, ddd, eee, and fff'' ;Pragmatic Example: Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are Olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{wpd|Category:Winter sports|Winter sports}} page. :{{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} ;given by... 
{{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}}

{{usage div}} '''Version-at-a-glance:''' :3) source: Wikiversity -- Expand usage to cover SISTER and LABEL parameters (lost in /doc file? Or just never updated?) // [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 06:48, 17 August 2008 (UTC) :2) source: Wikispecies/wikipedia -- Reconcile categories (Iterim) and code across sister projects // [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 05:53, 17 August 2008 (UTC)
:1) source: Commons -- Move forced italics from before LABEL to default only when undefined, and matching logic for stopping italics... gives user better formatting control, by specifying LABEL. No effect when not defined, so minimal impact. // [[User:Fabartus|Fra]][[User talk:Fabartus|nkB]] 04:51, 17 August 2008 (UTC)
==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{ Cat see also | List of category names (one or more) }}''' '''Parameters:''' # Most are pipe character separated category page names; up to 40 pages # LABEL=''Some other phrase''... → replaces defaults: ''"See also Category:" or "See also categories:"'' (prefix messages). ## That phrase is normally italicized. When defining LABEL any wikimarkup or HTML text will be accepted. ## You may assume a space before the first category link. ## The template is written in an HTML <span>...SISTER=de:V: for linking categories on the {{wpd|German language}} {{wpd|Wikiversity}}, or ## SISTER=fr:B: for linking categories on the {{wpd|French language}} {{wpd|Wikibooks}}. ;Simple examples # {{Cat see also|A}} → {{Cat see also|A}}

# {{Cat see also|A|B}} → {{Cat see also|A|B}}

# {{Cat see also|A|B|C}} → {{Cat see also|A|B|C}}
;example w/default message: : {{Cat see also|aaa|bbb|ccc|ddd|eee|fff}} ;would give (display as): : ''See also Categories:'' aaa, bbb, ccc, ddd, and eee ;example w/LABEL parameter option : {{Cat see also|LABEL=See this list to evaluate whether one would be a better choice of |aaa | bbb | ccc | ddd | eee | fff }} ;would give (display as): : ''See this list to evaluate whether one would be a better choice of categories: aaa, bbb, ccc, ddd, eee, and fff'' ;Pragmatic Example: Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are Olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{wpd|Category:Winter sports|Winter sports}} page. :{{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} ;given by... 
{{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}}
{{#ifexist:Template:Templates linking contents| {{Templates linking contents}} }} {{#ifexist:Category:Internal link templates| [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Category navigational templates| [[Category:Category navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifeq:{{Silence}}|NO| {{#ifexist:Category:Templates using ParserFunctions| [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} |}} {{#ifexist:Category:Internal link templates| [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Navigational templates| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Section templates | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:List templates| [[Category:List templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:Category namespace templates| [[Category:Category namespace templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] }} {{#ifexist:Category:See also templates| [[Category:See also templates]] }} {{#ifeq:{{SITENAME}}|Wikimedia Commons| [[en:Template:Cat see also]] [[b:en:Template:Cat see also]] [[species:Template:Cat see also]] [[v:Template:Cat see also]] }} [[zh:Template:参看]]

revision.comment: use <div> to recreate/copy use the rellink template
no period in other templates like [[Template:Main]]
Remove period; this is the only hatnote template that generates a label followed by a list that ends in a period (all the others ending in a period output a complete sentence).
trying to make it look better.
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2012 October 2#Template:Category see also]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
/* top */ take out unnecessary non-breaking spaces, add Oxford commas to avoid any confusion
/* top */ add space between just two items in list.
Nominated for deletion; see [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2014 November 27#Template:Category see also]]. ([[WP:TW|TW]])
shouldn't this be indented and italics?
+ - arz temporarily, bots will move it to Wikidata later
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/M777|M777]] ([[User talk:M777|talk]]) to last version by Funandtrvl
per discussion at [[Template_talk:Category_see_also#In_Articles.3F]]: <div class="hatnote"> → <div class="hatnote selfreference">
massively simplify, improving reliability, and finally making the |SISTER parameter work (now renamed |project)

revision.comment: remove deprecated parameters checks - no instances remain

switch this to use [[Module:Category see also]]; allows an indefinite number of categories, fixes the unnecessary comma in the case of two categories, and enables categories like "Category:Template:Foo"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Category see also|main}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: use [[Template:Category see also/Category pair check]], as tested in sandbox

{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Category see also|main}}{{Category see also/Category pair check|{{{1|}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

{{Commonstmp}} =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' information ''at the end of text on category pages. == Usage == {{indent|5}}'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken. == See also == * {{tl|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. * {{tl|Details}} * {{tl|Further}} * {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}) * {{tl|See also}} &msdash; Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convienient, as you need never spell it out at all! {{-}} ---- {| !{{Commonstmp}} !{{Wiktionarytmp}} !{{Metatmp}} |- !{{Wikisourcetmp}} ! ! |} ---- =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The perameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional {{w2|Sister projects}} ''''space=' perameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'space=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'space='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'Space=XYZ' results in creating an applied prefix ''''XYZ:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to fifteen category names. == Usage == {{indent|5}}'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken. {{lts|indent}} {{lts|i}} == See also == {{lts|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{lts|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{lts|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{lts|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia [[NAMCON]] compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{lts|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convienient, as you need never spell it out at all! {{-}} ---- {| !{{Commonstmp}} !{{Wiktionarytmp}} !{{Metatmp}} |- !{{Wikisourcetmp}} ! ! |} ---- =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The perameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional {{w2|Sister projects}} ''''space=' perameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'space=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'space='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'Space=XYZ' results in creating an applied prefix ''''XYZ:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to fifteen category names. == Usage == {{indent|5}}'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken. {{lts|indent}} {{lts|i}} == See also == {{lts|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{lts|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{lts|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{lts|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia [[NAMCON]] compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{lts|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all! [[Category:Miscellaneous templates]] [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Navigational templates]] [[Category:Category templates]] [[Category:Templates used in categories]] [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[zh:Template:参看]]

'''''See also: {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I|5}}[[:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}'''''

{{-}} {{Interwikitmp-grp}} =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The perameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional {{w2|Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects}} ''''space=' perameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'space=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'space='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'Space=XYZ' results in creating an applied prefix ''''XYZ:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to fifteen category names. == Usage == {{indent|5}}'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken. {{lts|indent}} {{lts|i}} == See also == {{lts|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{lts|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{lts|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{lts|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia [[NAMCON]] compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{lts|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all! [[Category:Miscellaneous templates]] [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates used in categories]] [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[zh:Template:参看]]

revision.text:
'''''See also {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I|5}}[[:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}'''''

{{-}} {{Interwikitmp-grp}}{{TOCright}} ==Use example== *Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page such as: {{cat see also|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} This method efficiently provides a look one level lower for decisions on categorization, is neat, and provides the same link as if the sub-sub-cats were direct daughter sub-cats. =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The perameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional {{w2|Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects}} ''''space=' perameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'space=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'space='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'Space=XYZ' results in creating an applied prefix ''''XYZ:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to fifteen category names. == Usage == {{indent|5}}'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken. {{lts|indent}} {{lts|i}} == See also == {{lts|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{lts|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{lts|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{lts|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia [[NAMCON]] compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{lts|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all! [[Category:Miscellaneous templates]] [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates used in categories]] [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[zh:Template:参看]]

{{-}} {{Interwikitmp-grp}}{{TOCright}} ==Use example== *Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page such as: {{cat see also|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} This method efficiently provides a look one level lower for decisions on categorization, is neat, and provides the same link as if the sub-sub-cats were direct daughter sub-cats. =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The perameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional {{w2|Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects}} ''''space=' perameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'space=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'space='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'Space=XYZ' results in creating an applied prefix ''''XYZ:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to fifteen category names. == Usage == {{indent|5}}'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken. {{lts|indent}} {{lts|i}} == See also == {{lts|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{lts|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{lts|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{lts|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia [[NAMCON]] compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to forty category names. {{Interwikitmp-grp2}} == Usage == {{indent|5}}'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken. {{lts|indent}} {{lts|i}} == See also == {{lts|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{lts|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{lts|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{lts|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia {{NAMCON}} compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{-}} {{TOCright}} ==Use example== *Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page such as: {{cat see also|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} This method efficiently provides a look one level lower for decisions on categorization, is neat, and provides the same link as if the sub-sub-cats were direct daughter sub-cats. =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The parameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional [[Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects]] ''''space=' perameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'space=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'space='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'Space=XYZ' results in creating an applied prefix ''''XYZ:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to forty category names. {{Interwikitmp-grp2}} == Usage == {{indent|5}}'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken. {{lts|indent}} {{lts|i}} == See also == {{lts|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{lts|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{lts|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{lts|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia {{NAMCON}} compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tl|See}} (deprecated - use {{tl|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{lts|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all! [[Category:Miscellaneous templates]] [[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates used in categories|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[zh:Template:参看]]

''See also {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I|5}}[[{{{SISTER}}}:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[{{{SISTER}}}:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}''

{{-}} {{TOCright}} ==Use example== *Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page such as: {{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} This method efficiently provides a look one level lower for decisions on categorization, is neat, and provides the same link as if the sub-sub-cats were direct daughter sub-cats or parents or cross-links to sisters at that level of the categorization scheme. =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The parameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional [[Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects]] ''''SISTER=' parameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'SISTER=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'SISTER='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'SISTER=Wikt' results in creating an applied prefix ''''Wikt:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to forty category names. {{Interwikitmp-grp|V=6|cat=typing-aid templates}} == Usage == :'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken.{{i2}} == See also == {{tlw|catlst}} -- a larger adaptation with some optional display differences, and the same interwiki capability. Unlike cat see also, it does not force a newline and indentation, which can be duplicated in it's wider bag of tricks. This version is smaller and should be used {{tlw|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{tlw|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia {{NAMCON}} compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{tlw|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all![[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{#ifeq:{{SITENAME}}|Wikipedia}}| {{#ifexist:[[Category:Navigational templates]]| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} {{#ifexist:[[Category:Section templates]] | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#ifexist:[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]] | [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}[[Category:Templates used in categories|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[zh:Template:参看]]

''See also {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I5}}[[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}''

''See also {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I5}}[[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}''

{{-}}Note:Hidden content when viewing directly--template generates an error message when given no parameters. {{TOCright}} ==Use example== *Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page such as: {{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} This method efficiently provides a look one level lower for decisions on categorization, is neat, and provides the same link as if the sub-sub-cats were direct daughter sub-cats or parents or cross-links to sisters at that level of the categorization scheme. =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The parameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional [[Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects]] ''''SISTER=' parameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'SISTER=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'SISTER='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'SISTER=Wikt' results in creating an applied prefix ''''Wikt:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to forty category names. {{Interwikitmp-grp|V=6|cat=typing-aid templates}} == Usage == :'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken.{{i2}} == See also == {{tlw|catlst}} -- a larger adaptation with some optional display differences, and the same interwiki capability. Unlike cat see also, it does not force a newline and indentation, which can be duplicated in it's wider bag of tricks. This version is smaller and should be used {{tlw|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{tlw|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia {{NAMCON}} compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{tlw|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all![[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{#ifeq:{{SITENAME}}|Wikipedia}}| {{#ifexist:[[Category:Navigational templates]]| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} {{#ifexist:[[Category:Section templates]] | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#ifexist:[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]] | [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}[[Category:Templates used in categories|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[zh:Template:参看]]

''See also {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I5}}[[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}''

''See also {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I5}}[[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}''

{{-}}Note:Hidden content when viewing directly--template generates an error message when given no parameters. {{TOCright}} ==Use example== *Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page such as: {{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} This method efficiently provides a look one level lower for decisions on categorization, is neat, and provides the same link as if the sub-sub-cats were direct daughter sub-cats or parents or cross-links to sisters at that level of the categorization scheme. =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The parameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional [[Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects]] ''''SISTER=' parameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'SISTER=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'SISTER='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'SISTER=Wikt' results in creating an applied prefix ''''Wikt:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to forty category names. {{Interwikitmp-grp|V=6|cat=typing-aid templates}} == Usage == :'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken.{{i2}} == See also == {{tlw|catlst}} -- a larger adaptation with some optional display differences, and the same interwiki capability. Unlike cat see also, it does not force a newline and indentation, which can be duplicated in it's wider bag of tricks. This version is smaller and should be used {{tlw|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{tlw|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia {{NAMCON}} compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{tlw|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all![[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{#ifeq:{{SITENAME}}|Wikipedia}}| {{#ifexist:[[Category:Navigational templates]]| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} {{#ifexist:[[Category:Section templates]] | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }} {{#ifexist:[[Category:List templates]] | [[Category:List templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#ifexist:[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]] | [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}[[Category:Templates used in categories|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[zh:Template:参看]] [[ja:Template:Cat see also]]

which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{tlw|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all![[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{#ifeq:{{SITENAME}}|Wikipedia}}| {{#ifexist:[[Category:Navigational templates]]| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} {{#ifexist:[[Category:Section templates]] | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }} {{#ifexist:[[Category:List templates]] | [[Category:List templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#ifexist:[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]] | [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}[[Category:Templates used in categories|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:See also templates]] [[zh:Template:参看]] [[ja:Template:Cat see also]]

''See also {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I5}}[[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}''

{{-}}Note:Hidden content when viewing directly--template generates an error message when given no parameters. {{TOCright}} ==Use example== {{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page such as: This method efficiently provides a look one level lower for decisions on categorization, is neat, and provides the same link as if the sub-sub-cats were direct daughter sub-cats or parents or cross-links to sisters at that level of the categorization scheme. =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The parameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional [[Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects]] ''''SISTER=' parameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'SISTER=' perameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'SISTER='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'SISTER=Wikt' results in creating an applied prefix ''''Wikt:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to forty category names. {{Interwikitmp-grp|V=6|cat=typing-aid templates}} == Usage == :'''{{'''See also:'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken.{{i2}} == See also == {{tlw|catlst}} -- a larger adaptation with some optional display differences, and the same interwiki capability. Unlike cat see also, it does not force a newline and indentation, which can be duplicated in it's wider bag of tricks. This version is smaller and should be used {{tlw|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{tlw|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia {{NAMCON}} compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{tlw|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all![[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{#ifeq:{{SITENAME}}|Wikipedia}}| {{#ifexist:[[Category:Navigational templates]]| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} {{#ifexist:[[Category:Section templates]] | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }} {{#ifexist:[[Category:List templates]] | [[Category:List templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#ifexist:[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]] | [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}[[Category:Templates used in categories|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:See also templates]] [[zh:Template:参看]] [[ja:Template:Cat see also]]

revision.text:
''See also {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#if:{{{2|}}}|Categories: {{I5}}[[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category:{{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]] |Categories: [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{1}}}|{{{1}}}]]}} |Editing error: '''No argument given''''' in template ''{{tl|cat see also}} }}{{#if:{{{2|}}}|{{#if:{{{3|}}}|, | and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{2}}}|{{{ 2 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{3|}}}|{{#if:{{{4|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{3}}}|{{{ 3 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{4|}}}|{{#if:{{{5|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{4}}}|{{{ 4 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{5|}}}|{{#if:{{{6|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{5}}}|{{{ 5 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{6|}}}|{{#if:{{{7|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{6}}}|{{{ 6 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{7|}}}|{{#if:{{{8|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{7}}}|{{{ 7 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{8|}}}|{{#if:{{{9|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{8}}}|{{{ 8 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{9|}}}|{{#if:{{{10|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{9}}}|{{{ 9 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{10|}}}|{{#if:{{{11|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{10}}}|{{{ 10 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{11|}}}|{{#if:{{{12|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{11}}}|{{{ 11 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{12|}}}|{{#if:{{{13|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{12}}}|{{{ 12 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{13|}}}|{{#if:{{{14|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{13}}}|{{{ 13 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{14|}}}|{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, |, and }} [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{14}}}|{{{ 14 }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{15|}}}|, and [[{{{SISTER|}}}:Category: {{{15}}}|{{{ X }}}]] }}{{#if:{{{16|}}}|…'''Error: [[Template:Cat see also]] maximum 15 articles allowed''' }}''

{{-}}Note:Hidden content when viewing directly--template generates an error message when given no parameters. {{TOCright}} ==Use example== {{cat see also|SISTER=W:|Luge|Bobsleigh|Skeleton}} Bobsledding, luge, and skeleton are olympic sports properly subcategorized under 'sledding', so shouldn't appear (strictly speaking categorically so to speak) as sub-categories of 'winter sports', but which a lay reader using categories might expect to find them. {{I2}}So to show their presence and guide proper selections for editors choosing categories amongst the three layers of categories, one can include the sub-sub-categories as a see also annotation on the {{Cat|Winter sports}} page such as: This method efficiently provides a look one level lower for decisions on categorization, is neat, and provides the same link as if the sub-sub-cats were direct daughter sub-cats or parents or cross-links to sisters at that level of the categorization scheme. =Purpose= {{[[Template:Cat see also|Cat see also]]}} is used for small sets of '''see also''' (list of other categories) for information ''in the end of text on category pages or talk pages, etc. #The parameters may be preceded by any 'correct' optional [[Wikipedia:Sister projects|sister projects]] ''''SISTER=' parameter''' which is first applied to all the default prefixes by template logic. ##By default, that creates an automatic prefix that is solely the string ''''Category'''' ##and when the 'SISTER=' parameter is given, an automatic '''':''''will be added between that and the defined value of 'SISTER='. #Thus the [[Wd|concatation]] with a 'SISTER=Wikt' results in creating an applied prefix ''''Wikt:Category:'''' which is prefixed to all terms in the list. #Hence the template has a very powerful 'Interwiki scope' thereby '''allowing one to list Categories on other sister projects.''' #The template will take up to forty category names. {{Interwikitmp-grp|V=6|cat=typing-aid templates}} == Usage == :'''{{'''Cat see also'''|Category Name_1|''optionalCategory Name_2''|''optionalCategory Name_nn''|...|''optionalCategory Name_ 15''}}''' :* Up to 15 parameters are permitted: only the first is mandatory. :* The list is dynamically generated so that a "&" is always placed between the final two entries. :* If more than 15 entries are supplied, a message will be displayed pointing out the run-over problem. ; NB : no newlines are permitted else the article links will be broken.{{i2}} == See also == {{tlw|catlst}} -- a larger adaptation with some optional display differences, and the same interwiki capability. Unlike cat see also, it does not force a newline and indentation, which can be duplicated in it's wider bag of tricks. This version is smaller and should be used {{tlw|Details}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Details|Details]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{Details|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}} {{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:Further|Further]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{further|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Main}}, to use when you have more than one main article. {{I}}- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:main|main]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> {{main|A|B|C}} {{tlw|MainBold}}, to use when you have more than one main article, primarily for use in category text, not Wikipedia {{NAMCON}} compliant inside articles. {{I}}-- e.g. - {{Tlx|mainBold|A|B|C}} --> {{mainBold|A|B|C}} {{tlw|Further}}){{I}}-- e.g. - {{[[{{ns:Template}}:See|See]]{{#if:A||A}}{{#if:B||B}}{{#if:C||C}}{{#if:{{{5|}}}||etc.}}}} --> :''Further information: [[A]]{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{2C|}}}|and}}{{#if: B| [[B]]}}{{#if: C|, }}{{#if: {{{3{{{4|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: C| [[C]]}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{4{{{5|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{4|}}}| [[{{{4|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{5{{{6|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{5|}}}| [[{{{5|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{6{{{7|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{6|}}}| [[{{{6|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{7{{{8|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{7|}}}| [[{{{7|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}|, }}{{#if: {{{8{{{9|}}}|}}}|and}}{{#if: {{{8|}}}| [[{{{8|}}}]]}}{{#if: {{{9|}}}|, and [[{{{9|}}}]]}}'' {{tlw|See also}} — Article version of this template (Has technical problem with specifying ':Category' spelt out, and this is far more convenient, as you need never spell it out at all![[Category:Internal link templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{#ifeq:{{SITENAME}}|Wikipedia}}| {{#ifexist:[[Category:Navigational templates]]| [[Category:Navigational templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} {{#ifexist:[[Category:Section templates]] | [[Category:Section templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }} {{#ifexist:[[Category:List templates]] | [[Category:List templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#ifexist:[[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions]] | [[Category:Templates using ParserFunctions|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}[[Category:Category namespace templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:See also templates]] [[zh:Template:参看]] [[ja:Template:Cat see also]]
